name: Order of the Ghostslayer
description: Ghostslayers refine hemocraft to destroy undead and hostile spirits.

3.name: Rite of the Dawn
3.description: You learn the Rite of the Dawn. Your rite damage is radiant, and your weapon attacks ignore resistance to rite damage.

3.name: Hallowed Veil
3.description: When a creature within 30 feet forces a save against fear or charm, you may expend a Blood Maledict use to grant advantage on the save.

7.name: Ethereal Step
7.description: As a bonus action, you can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain until end of turn.

11.name: Brand of Sundering
11.description: Your Brand of Castigation can affect incorporeal creatures and deals extra rite damage to branded targets.

15.name: Blood Curse of the Exorcist
15.description: You can curse a creature to disrupt possession and banish invasive spiritual effects.
